originalTitle: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
summary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) reached $2.92 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -7.01% change compared to its last close.
content:
In the latest trading session, BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) closed at $2.92, marking a -7.01% move from the previous day. The stock fell short of the S&P 500, which registered a loss of 0.51% for the day. Meanwhile, the Dow lost 0.2%, and the Nasdaq, a tech-heavy index, lost 1.47%.

Prior to today's trading, shares of the company had lost 19.07% lagged the Computer and Technology sector's loss of 2.99% and the S&P 500's gain of 0.53%.

The investment community will be closely monitoring the performance of BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. in its forthcoming earnings report. The company is predicted to post an EPS of -$0.04, indicating a 33.33% growth compared to the equivalent quarter last year. Meanwhile, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenue is projecting net sales of $36.37 million, up 12.01% from the year-ago period.

For the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates are projecting earnings of -$0.25 per share and revenue of $146.59 million, which would represent changes of +69.51% and +14.82%, respectively, from the prior year.

It's also important for investors to be aware of any recent modifications to analyst estimates for BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. These revisions typically reflect the latest short-term business trends, which can change frequently. Therefore, positive revisions in estimates convey analysts' confidence in the business performance and profit potential.

Our research demonstrates that these adjustments in estimates directly associate with imminent stock price performance. To capitalize on this, we've crafted the Zacks Rank, a unique model that incorporates these estimate changes and offers a practical rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, stretching from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has a noteworthy track record of outperforming, validated by third-party audits, with stocks rated #1 producing an average annual return of +25% since the year 1988. Over the past month, there's been no change in the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate. BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. is holding a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) right now.

The Computers - IT Services industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. At present, this industry carries a Zacks Industry Rank of 86, placing it within the top 35% of over 250 industries.

The strength of our individual industry groups is measured by the Zacks Industry Rank, which is calculated based on the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within these groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Remember to apply Zacks.com to follow these and more stock-moving metrics during the upcoming trading sessions.

chineseTitle: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) 的跌幅超过大盘：投资者需要了解什么
chineseSummary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc.（BBAI）在最近一个交易日收盘时达到2.92美元，较上一交易日收盘价上涨-7.01%。
chineseContent:
在最新的交易日中，BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI)收于2.92美元，较前一交易日上涨-7.01%。该股低于标准普尔 500 指数，后者当天下跌 0.51%。与此同时，道指下跌 0.2%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数下跌 1.47%。

在今天的交易之前，该公司的股价下跌了 19.07%，落后于计算机和技术板块的下跌 2.99% 以及标准普尔 500 指数的上涨 0.53%。

投资界将密切关注 BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. 即将发布的收益报告的表现。该公司预计每股收益为-0.04美元，较去年同期增长33.33%。与此同时，Zacks 的收入共识预计净销售额为 3637 万美元，比去年同期增长 12.01%。

对于全年，Zacks 一致预期预计每股收益为 - 0.25 美元，收入为 1.4659 亿美元，与上一年相比分别变化 +69.51% 和 +14.82%。

对于投资者来说，了解 BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. 分析师预测的任何最新修改也很重要。这些修改通常反映最新的短期业务趋势，而这些趋势可能会经常变化。因此，预测的积极修正传达了分析师对业务业绩和利润潜力的信心。

我们的研究表明，这些预估调整与即将到来的股价表现直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们精心设计了 Zacks Rank，这是一个独特的模型，融合了这些估计变化并提供了实用的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统从#1（强力买入）延伸到#5（强力卖出），具有出色的表现记录，经过第三方审计验证，自 1988 年以来，排名第一的股票产生的平均年回报率为 +25%。在过去的一个月里，Zacks 共识 EPS 估计没有变化。 BigBear.ai Holdings , Inc . 目前的 Zacks 排名为#3（持有）。

计算机 - IT 服务行业是计算机和技术行业的一部分。目前，该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 86，在 250 多个行业中排名前 35%。

我们各个行业组的实力是通过 Zacks 行业排名来衡量的，该排名是根据这些组中个股的平均 Zacks 排名计算的。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

请记住在即将到来的交易时段应用 Zacks.com 来跟踪这些以及更多的股票走势指标。
